channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Universal Orlando announces Epic Universe opening date
item.description: The theme park will feature more than 50 attractions, as well as entertainment, dining and shopping options across five “expansive worlds.
item.dc:creator: Scott Gustin, KTLA 5

item.title: Walter White of 'Breaking Bad' returns for New Mexico litter campaign
item.description: Two television ads featuring Bryan Cranston as Walter White, directed by "Breaking Bad" creator Vince Gilligan, were created to promote clean-up of New Mexico areas.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Salinas, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump assassination suspect demands Judge Cannon recuse from case
item.description: Ryan Routh, the man charged with attempting to assassinate former President Trump at his Florida golf course last month, asked U.S.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 3 states renew efforts to limit abortion pill access
item.description: The lawsuit was filed in a Texas federal court, roughly four months after the Supreme Court decided against undoing changes to the FDA’s regulations on the abortion pill that expanded access.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, NewsNation

item.title: Parkland shooting judge criticizes shooter's attorneys during talk to law students
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — The former judge who presided over the trial of the 2018 Parkland high school mass murderer sharply criticized his public defenders during a presentation to Miami law students Thursday, saying they acted unprofessionally and crossed several lines while representing him.
item.dc:creator: TERRY SPENCER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: A father and son are both indicted on murder charges in a mass school shooting in Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A grand jury indicted both a father and son on murder charges Thursday in a mass shooting at Apalachee High School in Winder, Georgia.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Almost 23% of people say politics influences where they live: Poll
item.description: "Some go so far as to consider moving to find that alignment," Danielle Hale, chief economist for Realtor.com, said.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NOAA releases 2024-25 winter weather outlook: Here's what to expect
item.description: Depending on where you live in the U.S., this winter could bring a mix of snow and rain or unseasonably warm weather, according to climate experts.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mitzi Gaynor, star of ‘South Pacific,’ dies at 93
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Mitzi Gaynor, the effervescent dancer and actor who starred as Nellie Forbush in the 1958 film "South Pacific" and appeared in other musicals with Bing Crosby, Frank Sinatra and Gene Kelly, has died. She was 93.
item.dc:creator: KAITLYN HUAMANI and BOB THOMAS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Indian government employee charged in foiled murder-for-hire plot in New York City
item.description: The Justice Department has announced criminal charges against an Indian government employee in connection with a foiled plot to kill a Sikh separatist leader living in New York City.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker And Larry Neumeister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 7-year-old crashes one school bus into another during apparent training in Missouri
item.description: She won't be able to drive for another nine years but parents of an Independence second grader say she's already had her first crash.
item.dc:creator: Dave D'Marko, ABC 4

item.title: 3 states renew efforts to limit abortion pill access
item.description: The lawsuit was filed in a Texas federal court Friday, roughly four months after the Supreme Court decided against undoing changes to the FDA’s regulations on the abortion pill that expanded access — such as allowing it to be mailed without an in-person doctor’s visit.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida homeowners fear soaring insurance cost after hurricanes
item.description: With 4 major hurricanes hitting Florida in 4 years, insurance premiums have skyrocketed and insurers have pulled back on coverage; residents are worried about more exclusions and price hikes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fugitive ex-Olympic snowboarder among 16 charged in connection to transnational drug trafficking, murder ring
item.description: An “Olympic athlete turned drug lord” and 15 others have been charged in a superseding indictment for allegedly running a transnational drug trafficking operation that routinely shipped large amounts of cocaine from Colombia to Canada via Southern California while orchestrating four murders “in furt
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: BLM's Western Solar Plan is 'fantasy world,' relies heavily on taxpayer dollars: GOP congressman
item.description: Rep. Matt Rosendale, R-Mont., said the Bureau of Land Management's updated Western Solar Plan would have to be subsidized by American taxpayers to work.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Catholic Archdiocese of LA to pay $880 million in childhood sex abuse claims
item.description: "I am sorry for every one of these incidents, from the bottom of my heart," Archbishop Jose H. Gomez wrote.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, NewsNation

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KRON4

item.title: Catholic Archdiocese of L.A. to pay $880 million in childhood sex abuse claims
item.description: A landmark settlement has been reached with the Catholic Archdiocese of Los Angeles to settle more than 1,300 claims of childhood sexual abuse and assault.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dollar General employee finds puppies dumped in trash amid cold Arkansas weather
item.description: Three puppies, less than a week old, were abandoned this week inside of a Dollar General Market dumpster, according to Arkansas authorities.
item.dc:creator: Elena Ramirez, Fox 5

item.title: Asian American evangelicals' theology is conservative. But that doesn't mean they vote that way
item.description: The Rev. Wayne Lee leads an English-speaking church of second- and third-generation Chinese Americans in the heart of Philadelphia’s Chinatown.
item.dc:creator: DEEPA BHARATH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Instagram rolls out new features to prevent sextortion scams targeting teens
item.description: Instagram has introduced a series of new safety features to prevent sextortion schemes, marking the platform's latest effort to protect users, especially teenagers, from online harm.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Texas Supreme Court halts execution of man in shaken baby case after lawmakers' last-minute appeal
item.description: The Texas Supreme Court has halted the scheduled execution of a man who would have become the first person in the U.S. put to death for a murder conviction tied to a diagnosis of shaken baby syndrome.
item.dc:creator: Juan A. Lozano, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Helene and Milton are both likely to be $50 billion disasters, joining ranks of most costly storms
item.description: Monstrous hurricanes Helene and Milton caused so much complex havoc that damages are still being added up, but government and private experts say they will likely join the infamous ranks of Katrina, Sandy and Harvey as super costly $50-billion-plus killers.
item.dc:creator: SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Ex-Las Vegas-area Democratic politician gets at least 28 years in prison for killing reporter
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — A former Las Vegas-area Democratic elected official was sentenced Wednesday to serve at least 28 years in Nevada state prison for killing an investigative journalist who wrote articles critical of his conduct in office two years ago and exposed an intimate relationship with a female
item.dc:creator: KEN RITTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Minnesota school district bans officer from teaching after he reenacted George Floyd's murder
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — A Minnesota school district has banned a police officer from working as a substitute teacher after a series of “racially harmful” actions that officials say included putting a student on the ground for a reenactment of the 2020 murder of George Floyd by a Minneapolis officer.
item.dc:creator: BY STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Dog spotted on top of Great Pyramid of Giza
item.description: Talk about a long walk. A paraglider getting an aerial view of the Great Pyramids of Giza in Egypt on Monday was surprised to see a dog atop the iconic giant pyramid.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Former Las Vegas-area official sentenced in murder of journalist
item.description: The former public administrator was accused of killing Jeff German after the reporter wrote articles critical of his conduct in office.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Bleakley, KRON4

item.title: ISIS-K orchestrated foiled Election Day terror plot: US official
item.description: Afghan native Nasir Ahmad Tawhedi, 27, was arrested in early October and accused of planning to target people on Election Day.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, Fox 5

item.title: Elon Musk commits $70 million to boost Donald Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, a tech mogul who is the world's richest person, plunged more than $70 million into helping Donald Trump and other Republicans win in November's election, making him one of the biggest donors to GOP causes this campaign season, according to campaign finance disclosures re
item.dc:creator: BRIAN SLODYSKO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: FTC announces rule to make it easier to cancel subscriptions
item.description: The department will soon implement a "final click to cancel rule," a move that will require sellers to make it "as easy for consumers to cancel their enrollment as it was to sign up.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: FEMA workers threatened by armed group in Tennessee
item.description: "They were all armed, open carry not guns drawn, but they had surrounded them and there was a lady there that was yelling and threatening them.
item.dc:creator: Karen Jenkins, Fox 5

item.title: Navy finds wreckage of fighter jet that crashed during training in Washington state
item.description: The U.S. Navy located the wreckage Wednesday of a fighter jet that crashed in Washington state during a routine training flight in mountainous terrain. The two crew members onboard remain missing.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Clint Eastwood's daughter arrested in Beverly Hills in domestic violence case
item.description: Actor Francesca Eastwood, daughter of legendary actor Clint Eastwood, was arrested in Beverly Hills over the weekend on suspicion of felony domestic violence, according to reporting from the Los Angeles Times.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, Fox 5

item.title: Man allegedly killed by son,19, in California was renowned photojournalist
item.description: In a bizarre twist to a grisly crime on a popular hiking trail in the San Gabriel Mountains where a 19-year-old man allegedly stabbed his father to death, the victim has been identified as a well-known, award-winning war photographer, photojournalist and professor at the University of the Arts Londo
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, Fox 5

item.title: What $35 trillion in US national debt means for Americans
item.description: With the national debt standing at more than $35 trillion, economists fear that the country's debt load will only grow.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, WGN 9
